calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Tax Costs
Off Calendar Feb-26-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff's motion to tax costs is denied in very large part. $30 are taxed because defendants' costs memorandum claims $170.90 for service of process costs and defendants' opposition papers show that defendants incurred $140.90 for service of process costs. All other claimed costs were reasonable in amount and necessarily incurred and are allowed either as a matter of right or in the court's discretion, which the court exercises to allow such costs. Prevailing party shall prepare and submit a proposed order to the Court for signature in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)

Notice Of Motion To Tax Costs
Off Calendar Jan-08-2016 Continued To Feb-26-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

PLAINTIFFS MADELINE CALLISON AND JAMES HIGUERA'S Motion To Tax Costs is continued to February 26, 2016 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302, per the agreement of parties.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/EG)
